Class BridgeImportProxy

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

DispatchProxy implementation for JsImportAttribute interfaces. Routes every method call to the RPC service.

public class BridgeImportProxy : DispatchProxy

object
DispatchProxy

Methods

Invoke(MethodInfo?, object?[]?)

Whenever any method on the generated proxy type is called, this method is invoked to dispatch control.

protected override object? Invoke(MethodInfo? targetMethod, object?[]? args)

Parameters

targetMethod MethodInfo

The method the caller invoked.

args object[]

The arguments the caller passed to the method.

Returns

object

The object to return to the caller, or null for void methods.
